scripts.build: bun run build:deps && bun run generate-llms-txt && bun run build:next
scripts.build:deps: bun run build:deps:diffs && bun run build:deps:truncate && bun run build:deps:tree
scripts.build:deps:diffs: output=$(cd ../../packages/diffs && bun run build 2>&1) && echo '[diffs] Successfully cleaned and built.' || (echo "$output" >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.build:deps:tree: output=$(cd ../../packages/trees && bun run build 2>&1) && echo '[trees] Successfully cleaned and built.' || (echo "$output" >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.build:deps:truncate: output=$(cd ../../packages/truncate && bun run build 2>&1) && echo '[truncate] Successfully cleaned and built.' || (echo "$output" >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.diffs:dev: export NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE=diffs PORT=$((${PIERRE_PORT_OFFSET:-0} + 3690)) && bash ../../scripts/run-dev.sh "$PORT" -- bun run _dev
scripts.trees:dev: export NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE=trees PORT=$((${PIERRE_PORT_OFFSET:-0} + 3691)) && bash ../../scripts/run-dev.sh "$PORT" -- bun run _dev
scripts.diffshub:dev: export NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE=diffshub PORT=$((${PIERRE_PORT_OFFSET:-0} + 3692)) && bash ../../scripts/run-dev.sh "$PORT" -- bun run _dev
scripts._dev: bun run build:deps && bun concurrently "bun run dev:deps:diffs" "bun run dev:deps:tree" "bun run dev:deps:truncate" "bun run dev:next" --names "diffs,trees,truncate,docs" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,purple"
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build:deps && bun run build:next && (bun ./test/e2e/check-playwright-binary.ts || bun run test:e2e:installbinary) && bunx playwright test -c test/e2e/playwright.config.ts
